content:
User wants to group sidebar items into categories.
Proposed Groups:
1. HACKATHON CORE (Essentials, Action Plan, Rules)
2. AEVUM FRAMEWORK (Solutions, Tips)
3. SUBMISSION (Submission Protocol, Checklist)
I will:
- Update navItems structure to include categories.
- Update sidebar rendering to show category labels in minimalist brutalist style (Monospace, subtle line).
- Ensure scroll-spy still works with nested structure.
